text:
J0520 Pain Interference with Therapy Activities CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency at which the resident's pain has limited their participation in rehabilitation thereapy sessions over the last five days. 0=Does not apply - I have not received rehabilitation therapy in the past five days. 
1=Rarely or not at all
2=Occasionally
3=Frequently
4=Almost constantly
8=Unable to answer effective 10/01/2023
911 PAIN_DAY_DAY_CD PAIN_DAY_DAY_CD J0530 Pain Interference with Day-to-Day
